channel.title: Game of Life on Tobias Theel | Senior Software Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Game of Life on Tobias Theel | Senior Software Engineer

item.title: Conway's Game of Life in Go: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description:
Introduction

Conway’s Game of Life is a famous cellular automaton devised by the British mathematician John Horton Conway. It is a zero-player game that evolves over time based on its initial state, requiring no further input from the player. The game takes place on an infinite two-dimensional grid of square cells, with each cell being either alive or dead.

In this blog post, we’ll explore how to implement Conway’s Game of Life in Go. We’ll provide step-by-step instructions, complete with functioning example code and detailed explanations.
